title: UltimaCraft Enchantments
description: Adds unique look for each enchanted book, tool, armor and weapon
body: ![](https://i.ibb.co/WKQSwzf/ultimacraft-enchantments-poster.jpg) # UltimaCraft Enchantments **UltimaCraft Enchantments** adds unique textures for each enchanted book, armor, tool and weapon of the game. It also supports multiple enchantments on the same item. **Important!** This pack requires [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or any mod that supports MCPatcher's CIT features ## Features - Visual enchantments on enchanted books, armor, tools and weapons - Multiple enchantments support for tools and weapons ## Future plans - Multiple enchantments support for enchanted books - Mod support
